main_hypothesis.justification: Anchor 'defective O-ring interconnector Tubo 4 T-02' literal corto.

alternatives.justification: 2 alts brief (daño membrana, sellado permeate carriers).

recommended_action.justification: Isolate T-02 + replace O-rings + pressure test — match operacional.

requested_data.justification: Pide pressure decay test results — match accepted.

decision_change_condition.justification: Trivial: si pressure decay sin anomalía → switch.
